info.title: eBird API 2.0
info.description: The eBird API provides programmatic access to eBird observation data, taxonomy, hotspot data, and regional information. eBird is the world's largest biodiversity-related citizen science project.

parameters.name: regionCode
parameters.description: eBird region code (e.g. US, US-NY, US-NY-109)

parameters.name: back
parameters.description: Number of days back to fetch (1-30)

parameters.name: r
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of up to 10 region codes

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid API key
